lines.english: In the Society of the Saints, spiritual conversations take place.
The Holy Saints meditate in remembrance, in ecstasy.
The sinful mistakes of millions of incarnations are erased. ||2||
Who have obtained the treasure of the Lord's Feet. ||4||95||164||
Slave Nanak is a sacrifice to those
Their minds and bodies are immersed in supreme ecstasy. ||3||
Gauree, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋ ਕਿਛੁ ਕਰਿ ਜਿਤੁ ਮੈਲੁ ਨ ਲਾਗੈ ॥
lines.translit: so kichh kar jit mail na laagai |
lines.english: Do only that, by which no filth or pollution shall stick to you.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਕੀਰਤਨ ਮਹਿ ਏਹੁ ਮਨੁ ਜਾਗੈ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: har keeratan meh ehu man jaagai |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Let your mind remain awake and aware, singing the Kirtan of the Lord's Praises. ||1||Pause||
In the Society of the Saints, chant only the Name. ||1||
Meditate in remembrance on the One Lord; do not be in love with duality.
The karma of good actions, the Dharma of righteous living, religious rituals, fasts and worship
Their works are brought to fruition,

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾ ਕੀ ਪ੍ਰੀਤਿ ਅਪੁਨੇ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਨਾਲਿ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: jaa kee preet apune prabh naal |3|
lines.english: if they place their love in God. ||3||
- practice these, but do not know any other than the Supreme Lord God. ||2||
says Nanak, who has renounced corruption. ||4||96||165||
Infinitely invaluable is that Vaishnaav, that worshipper of Vishnu,
They desert you even when you are alive, O madman;
what good can they do when someone is dead? ||1||
Gauree, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਮਰਿ ਗੋਵਿੰਦੁ ਮਨਿ ਤਨਿ ਧੁਰਿ ਲਿਖਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: simar govind man tan dhur likhiaa |
lines.english: Meditate in remembrance on the Lord of the Universe in your mind and body - this is your pre-ordained destiny.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਹੂ ਕਾਜ ਨ ਆਵਤ ਬਿਖਿਆ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: kaahoo kaaj na aavat bikhiaa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: The poison of Maya is of no use at all. ||1||Pause||
Those who have eaten this poison of deception

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਾ ਕੀ ਤ੍ਰਿਸਨਾ ਕਬਹੂੰ ਨ ਜਾਈ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: taa kee trisanaa kabahoon na jaaee |2|
lines.english: - their thirst shall never depart. ||2||
The treacherous world-ocean is filled with terrible pain.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਮ ਨਾਮ ਬਿਨੁ ਕੈਸੇ ਉਤਰਸਿ ਪਾਰਿ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: raam naam bin kaise utaras paar |3|
lines.english: Without the Lord's Name, how can anyone cross over? ||3||
O Nanak, worship and adore the Name of the Lord. ||4||97||166||
Gauree, Fifth Mehl:
Joining the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy, you shall be saved here and hereafter.
The bearded emperor who struck down the poor,
The Creator administers true justice.
has been burnt in the fire by the Supreme Lord God. ||1||
The slanderer died after contracting the deadly fever. ||2||
In the beginning, and throughout the ages, His glory is manifest.
He is the Saving Grace of His slaves. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਨਿ ਮਾਰਿਆ ਜਿ ਰਖੈ ਨ ਕੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: tin maariaa ji rakhai na koe |
lines.english: He is killed, and no one can save him.
The Lord hugs His slaves close in His Embrace.
Here and hereafter, his reputation is evil. ||3||
Nanak seeks the Lord's Sanctuary, and meditates on the Naam. ||4||98||167||
The memorandum was proven to be false by the Lord Himself.
Gauree, Fifth Mehl:
The sinner is now suffering in despair. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਸੁ ਕਉ ਜਮੁ ਨਹੀ ਆਵੈ ਨੇਰਾ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: tis kau jam nahee aavai neraa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: - death does not even approach them. ||1||Pause||
Those who have my Lord of the Universe as their support
the blind fools strike their own heads with their own hands. ||2||
Sickness afflicts those who commit sins;
In the True Court, they lie;
God Himself sits as the Judge. ||3||
By their own actions, they are bound and gagged.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦਰਬੁ ਗਇਆ ਸਭੁ ਜੀਅ ਕੈ ਸਾਥੈ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: darab geaa sabh jeea kai saathai |4|
lines.english: All their wealth is gone, along with their lives. ||4||
Nanak has taken to the Sanctuary of the Lord's Court;
my Creator has preserved my honor. ||5||99||168||
Gauree, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨ ਕੀ ਧੂਰਿ ਮਨ ਮੀਠ ਖਟਾਨੀ ॥
lines.translit: jan kee dhoor man meetth khattaanee |
lines.english: The dust of the feet of the humble beings is so sweet to my mind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੂਰਬਿ ਕਰਮਿ ਲਿਖਿਆ ਧੁਰਿ ਪ੍ਰਾਨੀ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: poorab karam likhiaa dhur praanee |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Perfect karma is the mortal's pre-ordained destiny. ||1||Pause||
